历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 10448, 12004, 16833, 22942, and 23368 respectively. Overall, there is a trend of year-by-year decline, with a cumulative decline of about 6500 places in the last three years; in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 22942, and in 2025 it remained basically stable at 23368, indicating that the ranking has stabilized after the reform. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 23368. In recent years, the enrollment plan has been basically stable at around 73-74 people, with no significant fluctuations.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a national Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 71st, with its ranking continuously rising in recent years (from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength and brand influence are steadily improving, enhancing its appeal to candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to a public opinion incident where the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply; its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, with an evaluation of 'average', and no high-heat attention has appeared; there is no obvious signal of a significant drop in historical admission anomalies for Yunnan University; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+, Ecology was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, among which Statistics A- is directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors (such as Statistics, Mathematical and Physical Basic Sciences, etc.), which has a certain appeal for applying to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Clinical Medicine have high social heat and are highly recommended; Electrical Engineering and Automation is also a high-heat recommendation. The popularity of these majors may drive competition for related major groups at Yunnan University; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou college entrance examination is approximately 299,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 208,403, a slight increase from 2025 (207,171), leading to a slight intensification of competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, geographically adjacent to Guizhou Province, with similar climate and culture, providing a certain regional appeal to Guizhou candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Guizhou for Physics Category (about 73 people), making it an important choice for Guizhou candidates applying to provincial 211 universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the baseline ranking of 23368 in 2025, a slight increase in the number of Physics Category candidates, the continuous rise in the university's level, and the driving effect of popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information on application heat, it is expected that the admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the baseline of 23368. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23318, with a range of 22818-23818.

Tier 3 majors can be used as safety options. 历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 1945th, 2205th, 2386th, 8893rd, and 3256th respectively. In 2024, due to the first new Gaokao reform in Guizhou Province, the ranking system underwent structural changes, causing the History Category ranking to significantly drop to 8893rd; in 2025, it quickly rebounded to 3256th, reflecting stabilization after the initial fluctuation in the reform year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3256th; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 20 students in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 18 in 2026, with 2026 remaining the same as 2025, showing no expansion or reduction, maintaining a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 71st, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 Gaokao cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the public opinion incident of the College of Life Sciences' employment rate being only 4.63%, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, rated as 'average', without high attention; no obvious gap signals have been observed in historical admission anomalies for Yunnan University; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+, Ecology A, and Statistics A-, with all three disciplines at A- or above, among which Ethnology is at the national top level, attracting some candidates for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, while teacher training/education majors show a divided and wait-and-see trend; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 90,597 in the History Category, a slight increase from 2025 (90,087), leading to a minor intensification of competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, geographically adjacent to Guizhou Province, with similar climate and culture, offering some regional appeal to Guizhou candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Guizhou is moderate, with a relatively stable plan of 18 students for the History Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3256th, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the number of History Category candidates in Guizhou Province, the continuous rise in university level but negative reputation public opinion, it is expected that the admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly drop from the 3256th baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3306th, with a range of 2806th to 3806th.
